zh.Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德
zh.Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾斯瓦洛可拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne West於1315年出生在英國維爾爾斯瓦洛可拉福時，她的父親Thomas West64歲，母親Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe24歲。她於1336年與Sir Thomas Barrett在英國英格蘭肯特霍爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1370年在英國肯特霍爾斯特享年55歲。

zh-hans.Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德
zh-hans.Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾斯瓦洛可拉福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne West于1315年出生在英国維爾爾斯瓦洛可拉福时，她的父亲Thomas West64岁，母亲Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe24岁。她于1336年与Sir Thomas Barrett在英国英格兰肯特霍爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1370年在英国肯特霍爾斯特享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne West was born in 1315, in Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, England, her father, Thomas West, was 64 and her mother, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, was 24. She married Sir Thomas Barrett in 1336, in Hawkhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1370, in Hawkhurst, Kent, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne West est née en 1315, à Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas West, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Barrett en 1336, à Hawkhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1370, à Hawkhurst, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne West 1315 in Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas West 64 und ihre Mutter Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe 24. Sie hat 1336 in Hawkhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Barrett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Hawkhurst, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne West è nata il nel 1315 nel Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Thomas West, aveva 64 anni e sua madre, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Barrett nel 1336, nel Hawkhurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1370, nel Hawkhurst, Kent, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Westが1315年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアスワロウクリフで生まれた時，父Thomas Westは64歳，母Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupeは24歳であった。1336年にイギリスイギリスケントハウクハルストでSir Thomas Barrettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1370年にイギリスケントハウクハルストで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne West(이)가 1315년 영국 윌츠히르 스월로c리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas West(은)는 64세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 호k후르스트에서 Sir Thomas Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 켄트 호k후르스트에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne West nasceu em 1315, em Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas West, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Barrett em 1336, em Hawkhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1370, em Hawkhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne West родилась в 1315 г. в местности сваллоуклифф, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas West было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Barrett в 1336 г. в местности ховхурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности ховхурст, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne West nació en 1315, en Swallowcliffe, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas West, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Barrett en 1336, en Hawkhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1370, en Hawkhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
